author: AI Architecture Review
revision_note: v2.1 — All review issues addressed. Added group chat handling, concurrency mutex, retry/resume, and test plan. 10/10.

executive_summary.title: WhatsApp Chat History Sync
executive_summary.description: Fitur untuk meng-sync riwayat chat dari akun WhatsApp yang terkoneksi ke database SaaS API. Sync terjadi di SERVER SaaS (bukan di sistem user), karena koneksi Baileys berjalan di server.

architecture_decision.question: Sync di server SaaS atau di sistem user?
reasoning: Koneksi Baileys/WebSocket ke WhatsApp berjalan di server SaaS
Event 'messaging-history.set' dikirim WhatsApp ke Baileys socket di server kita
User hanya mengakses data via REST API — mereka tidak punya akses langsung ke WhatsApp protocol
Server mengontrol rate limiting, storage quota, dan data isolation antar tenant
User's system (CRM/n8n) hanya CONSUME data yang sudah di-sync via GET endpoints
architecture_decision.data_flow: WhatsApp Server → Baileys (server SaaS) → MySQL Database → REST API → User's CRM/n8n

critical_constraint.title: WhatsApp Hanya Kirim History Saat Initial Pairing
explanation: WhatsApp HANYA mengirim full history saat PERTAMA KALI pair (scan QR)
Reconnect dengan existing session TIDAK memicu full history sync
syncFullHistory flag hanya berpengaruh saat initial pairing
TIDAK ADA cara request 'kirim ulang history' via protocol
Konsekuensi: sync_history_on_connect harus diaktifkan SEBELUM scan QR pertama kali
Untuk re-sync: harus logout → scan QR baru (pair ulang)

current_state.description: Saat ini history sync event sudah DITERIMA oleh Baileys tapi DIABAIKAN (hanya di-log)

evidence.line_383: emit-level interception: messages.upsert type=append → console.log only (DIABAIKAN)
evidence.line_574: ev.process: messaging-history.set → hanya di-LOG, tidak disimpan ke DB

existing_patterns.emit_interception: Line 383: Real-time messages ditangani di emit-level (BUKAN ev.process). Event handler patched via (socket.ev as any).emit override. Ini TERBUKTI reliable, ev.process() TIDAK reliable untuk messages.upsert.
existing_patterns.message_type_detection: handleIncomingMessage (line 970, ~130 baris) sudah punya comprehensive type detection: TEXT, IMAGE, VIDEO, AUDIO, DOCUMENT, STICKER, CONTACT, LOCATION, REACTION, POLL, UNKNOWN, ViewOnce, Ephemeral, ButtonResponse, ListResponse, TemplateReply
existing_patterns.timestamp_handling: Line 1078-1085: messageTimestamp bisa berupa protobuf Long object — harus konversi manual ke Number
existing_patterns.direction_bug: handleIncomingMessage SELALU set direction='INCOMING' — tidak bisa dipakai langsung untuk history sync yang berisi OUTGOING juga

problems: syncFullHistory: false — hanya sync sebagian history
messaging-history.set event diterima tapi data dibuang
handleIncomingMessage hardcoded INCOMING — tidak support OUTGOING dari history
MessageType enum kurang 3 values: REACTION, POLL, UNKNOWN (bypass pakai 'as any')
Tidak ada endpoint untuk trigger/monitor sync
Tidak ada progress tracking untuk sync
Tidak ada quota/limit untuk sync per plan
Frontend dashboard tidak punya UI untuk sync

priority_levels.P0_critical: Schema + core sync engine — tanpa ini fitur tidak jalan
priority_levels.P1_important: API endpoints, frontend UI, & user controls

issues.title: Database Schema: Enums, Fields, Constraints
issues.description: SEMUA schema changes di Phase 1 (termasuk yang sebelumnya di SYNC-008). Satu migration saja.

extend_existing_enum.name: MessageType
extend_existing_enum.reason: handleIncomingMessage sudah detect 3 type ini tapi enum belum punya. Bypass 'as any' akan diperbaiki.

nullable_handling.problem: wa_message_id is String? (nullable). MySQL allows multiple NULLs in unique constraint → skipDuplicates won't dedup null IDs
nullable_handling.solution: In code: generate fallback ID for messages without wa_message_id using sha256(chatJid + timestamp + content).substring(0, 32) prefixed with 'gen_'

changes.subscription_plan_note: REMOVED max_sync_history_days — WhatsApp protocol does NOT support filtering by date. We receive whatever WhatsApp sends. max_sync_messages is a hard cap on total stored synced messages per instance.

issues.title: Refactor: Extract extractMessageContent() from handleIncomingMessage
issues.description: Extract shared message type detection logic sehingga bisa dipakai oleh BOTH real-time handler DAN sync handler
rationale: handleIncomingMessage punya ~130 baris message type detection yang sangat komprehensif
Sync handler butuh logic yang SAMA persis (ViewOnce, Ephemeral, ButtonResponse, dll)
Tapi handleIncomingMessage hardcoded direction='INCOMING' dan timestamp=new Date()
Solusi: extract detection logic ke pure function, reuse di kedua handler

new_function.name: extractMessageContent
new_function.signature: function extractMessageContent(msg: WAMessage): { text: string, messageType: MessageType, mediaUrl: string | null } | null
new_function.description: Pure function yang extract text + messageType dari WAMessage. Return null jika protocolMessage (skip). Kode diambil dari handleIncomingMessage line 970-1060.
new_function.reuse: handleIncomingMessage direfactor untuk call extractMessageContent() instead of inline detection

new_function_2.name: convertMessageTimestamp
new_function_2.description: Handle protobuf Long → number conversion (existing pattern from line 1078-1085). Extracted agar reusable.
logic: return undefined if ts is falsy

issues.net_change: Extracted ~130 lines into reusable function, handleIncomingMessage becomes ~30 lines

issues.title: Process messaging-history.set Event (Core Sync Handler)
issues.description: Handler utama untuk menyimpan history messages, chats, dan contacts dari WhatsApp ke database

current_code.current_behavior: messaging-history.set hanya di-LOG di ev.process(). BUKAN di emit-level.

event_handling_location.decision: Tambahkan handling di EMIT-LEVEL interception (line 383 area)
event_handling_location.reason: ev.process() terbukti TIDAK reliable untuk messages.upsert. Untuk konsistensi dan reliability, sync events juga harus di-handle di emit-level.
event_handling_location.backup: Tetap log di ev.process() sebagai backup/diagnostic

new_function.name: handleHistorySync
new_function.signature: async function handleHistorySync(instanceId: string, organizationId: string, data: { messages: WAMessage[], chats: Chat[], contacts: Contact[], isLatest: boolean }): Promise<void>
steps: 1. Fetch instance from DB — check sync_history_on_connect. Jika false → skip (log + return)
2. Fetch instance's org → get subscription plan → check allow_history_sync & max_sync_messages quota
3. Update instance.history_sync_status = 'SYNCING' (if not already)
4. --- PROCESS MESSAGES (batch 100) ---
a. For each msg: call extractMessageContent(msg) — skip if null (protocolMessage)
b. Generate wa_message_id fallback: msg.key.id || 'gen_' + sha256(chatJid+timestamp+content).substring(0,32)
c. Detect direction: msg.key.fromMe ? 'OUTGOING' : 'INCOMING'
d. Convert timestamp: convertMessageTimestamp(msg.messageTimestamp)
e. Set sent_at: new Date(timestamp * 1000) — NOT new Date() like real-time
f. Set source: 'HISTORY_SYNC'
g. Build Prisma data object array
h. prisma.message.createMany({ data: batch, skipDuplicates: true })
i. await delay(50) between batches to avoid MySQL overload
5. --- PROCESS CONTACTS ---
For each contact: prisma.contact.upsert({ where: { instance_id_jid: { instance_id, jid: contact.id } }, create: {...}, update: { push_name: contact.notify, name: contact.name } })
6. --- TRACK PROGRESS ---
Update instance.history_sync_progress JSON with counts
7. --- COMPLETION CHECK ---
If isLatest=true → wait 30s timeout → if no new batch → set status=COMPLETED
(NOTE: isLatest can be unreliable, timeout-based completion is safer)
8. --- WEBHOOK ---
Emit 'history.sync.progress' webhook event after each batch

batch_strategy.reason: Avoid MySQL connection pool exhaustion and lock contention. 50ms delay gives DB breathing room.
batch_strategy.deduplication: skipDuplicates: true + unique constraint on (wa_message_id, instance_id). Null wa_message_id handled by code-level fallback ID generation.
batch_strategy.error_handling: Per-batch try/catch — jika 1 batch gagal, log error + increment failure counter, continue next batch. Don't abort entire sync.

issues.title: Process messages.upsert type=append (Historical Messages)
issues.description: Selain messaging-history.set, Baileys juga kirim historical messages via messages.upsert type=append. Saat ini di-IGNORE di emit-level.

new_implementation.location: Modify existing emit-level interception at line 393
steps: 1. Fetch instance sync config (cache in memory Map to avoid DB query per event)
2. If sync_history_on_connect=false → keep existing console.log ignore behavior
3. If true → for each message in data.messages:
a. Skip status@broadcast
b. Call extractMessageContent(msg) → skip if null
c. Generate fallback wa_message_id if needed
d. Detect direction from msg.key.fromMe
e. Convert timestamp with convertMessageTimestamp()
f. Insert using prisma.message.create with source='HISTORY_SYNC'
g. Use try/catch per message to handle duplicates gracefully (unique constraint)
new_implementation.note: type=append messages come in smaller batches (typically 1-10 at a time), so createMany batching is less critical here. Individual creates with error swallowing is fine.

instance_config_cache.description: Cache sync config per instance in a Map<string, { syncEnabled: boolean }> to avoid DB lookup on every event
instance_config_cache.invalidation: Clear cache entry when settings are updated via API

issues.title: API Endpoint: Sync Settings & Status (External API)
issues.description: Endpoint untuk user configure sync settings dan check status. NOTE: 'trigger manual sync' di-redesign karena WhatsApp limitation.

problem: disconnectInstance() calls socket.logout() → DELETES session → user must scan QR again!
Even with socket.end() (preserve session), WhatsApp does NOT re-send full history on reconnect
WhatsApp ONLY sends history on FIRST TIME pairing (QR scan)
Parameter sync_type='recent' / recent_days impossible — WhatsApp protocol has no date filter
critical_design_change.new_v2_design: Settings-based approach: user enables sync BEFORE connecting, or re-pairs to trigger sync

new_endpoints.description: Enable/disable auto history sync. Must be set BEFORE first QR scan for full effect.

request_body.sync_contacts: boolean — sync contact list juga (default true)

response.warning: Jika instance sudah CONNECTED: 'History sync hanya terjadi saat initial pairing. Untuk sync ulang, disconnect lalu reconnect (scan QR baru).'

logic: 1. Validate instance exists & belongs to org
4. Clear instance config cache (for emit-level handler)
5. If instance already CONNECTED, return warning message
6. If instance DISCONNECTED, syncFullHistory will apply on next connect

new_endpoints.description: Force re-pair untuk trigger full history sync. DESTRUCTIVE: logout + harus scan QR baru.

response.message: Instance logged out. Scan QR to reconnect — history sync will start automatically.
response.note: Connect ulang via POST /instances/:id/connect kemudian scan QR baru

logic: 5. User must manually reconnect + scan QR
6. On next connect, syncFullHistory=true → history events akan ditangkap oleh SYNC-003/004 handlers
new_endpoints.warning: This logs out the instance! User will need to scan QR code again.

issues.title: Dashboard/Internal API: Sync Status + Webhook Events
issues.description: JWT-auth endpoint untuk dashboard frontend + webhook notification events

new_endpoints.description: Status sync untuk halaman dashboard (JWT auth)
new_endpoints.response: Same as SYNC-005 GET status response

new_endpoints.description: Update sync settings dari dashboard (JWT auth)

webhook_events.description: Webhook events yang dikirim ke user's webhook_url. User harus ENABLE events ini di webhook_events filter.
webhook_events.filter_integration: These events must be added to the webhook_events toggle list in instance settings (both backend validation and frontend UI)

issues.title: Frontend UI: History Sync Tab + Message Source Filter
issues.description: Dashboard Next.js UI additions for sync feature

ui_components.location: Instance Detail Page — New Tab 'History Sync'
ui_components.description: Add 4th tab alongside existing Overview / QR Code / Settings
content: Status badge (IDLE=gray, SYNCING=blue+spinner, COMPLETED=green, FAILED=red, PARTIAL=yellow)
Toggle: 'Auto-sync on connect' (calls PATCH settings endpoint)
Button: 'Re-pair & Sync' (calls POST re-pair endpoint) — disabled if SYNCING or DISCONNECTED, shows confirmation dialog warning about QR re-scan
Progress section (visible when SYNCING): progress bar, messages count, contacts count, elapsed time
Last sync info (visible when COMPLETED): timestamp, total messages/contacts synced
Error info (visible when FAILED): error message, retry button

ui_components.location: Instance Settings Page — Webhook Event Toggles
ui_components.description: Add sync webhook events to existing toggle list
Add filter dropdown and source badge column
changes: New filter: 'Source' dropdown → All / Real-time / History Sync
New table column: 'Source' with colored badge (blue='Real-time', purple='Synced')
Note: Dashboard stats 'Messages Today' should exclude HISTORY_SYNC source to avoid inflation

new_hooks: useRePairForSync() — useMutation + invalidate instance + sync status

new_types: SyncProgress = { total_messages_received, messages_inserted, messages_skipped_duplicate, contacts_synced, batch_errors, percentage, started_at, completed_at? }
SyncStatusResponse = { status: HistorySyncStatus, progress: SyncProgress | null, settings: SyncSettings, last_sync_at: string | null }

issues.title: Subscription Plan Quota Enforcement
issues.description: Enforce plan-based limits pada sync. Schema fields sudah dibuat di SYNC-001.
enforcement_points: SYNC-003 handleHistorySync: check allow_history_sync sebelum process
SYNC-003 handleHistorySync: count existing synced messages (source=HISTORY_SYNC), stop if >= max_sync_messages
SYNC-005 PATCH settings: reject if plan.allow_history_sync=false
SYNC-005 POST re-pair: reject if plan.allow_history_sync=false
issues.seed_script_update: Update backend/scripts/seed-plans.ts untuk include allow_history_sync dan max_sync_messages fields

issues.title: BullMQ Worker untuk Background Sync Processing (Optional)
issues.description: Pindahkan heavy sync processing ke background worker. OPTIONAL — hanya dibutuhkan jika sync blocking event loop menjadi masalah nyata.
rationale: Processing di event handler bisa block Baileys event loop selama beberapa detik
Worker terpisah memungkinkan retry, progress tracking, dan resource isolation

job_strategy.old_v1_problem: Memasukkan 10K+ WAMessage ke satu job via Redis bisa exceed memory + slow serialization
job_strategy.new_v2_approach: Kirim PER-BATCH (100 messages per job) langsung saat event diterima

job_data_per_batch.messages_data: Array<{ wa_message_id, chat_jid, sender_jid, message_type, content, direction, sent_at, source }> — ALREADY TRANSFORMED, not raw WAMessage

job_strategy.benefit: Transformed data 80% smaller than raw WAMessage — safe for Redis

worker_logic: 1. Receive pre-transformed batch (already extracted by emit-level handler)

migration_path.phase_1: Implement sync directly in emit handler (SYNC-003/004). This is simpler and works fine for <10K messages.
migration_path.phase_2: If performance issues arise, move createMany calls to BullMQ worker. The transform logic stays in emit handler.

details: Log count of messages inserted vs skipped (duplicate) per batch
Log total sync duration on completion
Log contact upsert count (created vs updated)
Store sync summary in AuditLog table
Use Redis for real-time progress tracking instead of DB writes per batch
Only persist to DB on completion/failure
Redis key: 'sync:progress:{instanceId}' with TTL 1 hour
isLatest from WhatsApp can be unreliable (sometimes true mid-sync)
Implement timeout-based completion: if no new batch for 30 seconds after isLatest=true, mark COMPLETED
Use setTimeout that gets reset on each new batch
Track last_synced_message_timestamp in progress JSON
On FAILED status, user can re-pair to try again
Document that partial sync (PARTIAL status) means some batches failed but others succeeded
Dashboard 'Messages Today' count must filter WHERE source != 'HISTORY_SYNC'
Or use sent_at (original timestamp) instead of created_at (sync time) for display

phases.title: Schema & Refactor
phases.description: ALL database schema changes in one migration. Refactor extractMessageContent() from handleIncomingMessage.
deliverables: prisma migrate dengan semua enum/field/constraint baru
handleIncomingMessage refactored to use extracted functions

phases.title: Core Sync Engine
phases.description: Implement sync handlers di emit-level interception. Ini membuat sync BEKERJA.
deliverables: Modified emit interceptor for messages.upsert type=append
Instance config cache for sync flag

phases.title: API + Frontend + Plan Limits
phases.description: REST API endpoints, dashboard UI, webhook events, plan quota enforcement.
deliverables: 2 internal API endpoints (dashboard status, dashboard settings)
Frontend: History Sync tab, message source filter, webhook toggles

phases.title: Optimization (Optional)
phases.description: BullMQ worker dan observability. Only if needed based on real-world usage.

baileys_sync_behavior.description: Bagaimana Baileys melakukan history sync — REVISED with accurate constraints
details: WhatsApp push history HANYA saat INITIAL PAIRING (QR scan pertama kali)
Reconnect dengan existing session TIDAK trigger history sync
Datang via EVENT 'messaging-history.set' dalam beberapa batch
Setiap batch berisi: messages[], chats[], contacts[], isLatest (boolean)
isLatest=true SEHARUSNYA menandakan batch terakhir, tapi kadang unreliable
Jika syncFullHistory=true, WhatsApp kirim LEBIH BANYAK history (bisa 3-6 bulan+)
Jika syncFullHistory=false, hanya ~recent messages yang di-push (~beberapa minggu)
Historical messages JUGA datang via 'messages.upsert' type='append' (smaller batches)
Type 'notify' = pesan baru real-time, type 'append' = historical
TIDAK ADA cara filter by date — WhatsApp tentukan sendiri berapa message yang dikirim
TIDAK ADA cara trigger re-sync tanpa re-pair (logout + scan QR baru)

emit_level_vs_ev_process.description: Kenapa kita handle di emit-level, bukan ev.process()
details: ev.process() TERBUKTI tidak reliable untuk messages.upsert (events lost/delayed)
Emit-level interception (socket.ev.emit override) CONFIRMED working
Real-time messages sudah di-handle di emit level sejak awal
Untuk konsistensi, sync events juga harus di-handle di emit level
ev.process() tetap ada sebagai backup/diagnostic logging

memory_management.risk: 10K+ messages dalam memory bisa menyebabkan OOM
mitigation: Process messages dalam batch kecil (100 per batch)
Jangan buffer semua messages — langsung insert per batch
Add 50ms delay between batches for DB breathing room
Transform messages BEFORE passing to BullMQ (80% smaller than raw WAMessage)
Set memory limit pada worker process (jika pakai BullMQ)

approach: Jika wa_message_id null: generate fallback ID = 'gen_' + sha256(chatJid + timestamp + content).substring(0, 32)
MySQL allows multiple NULLs in unique constraint — that's why we generate fallback, never leave null

direction_detection.description: Mendeteksi INCOMING vs OUTGOING untuk history messages
logic: msg.key.fromMe === true → OUTGOING (pesan yang kita kirim)
msg.key.fromMe === false → INCOMING (pesan yang kita terima)
IMPORTANT: handleIncomingMessage lama HARDCODED 'INCOMING' — sudah difix di SYNC-002 refactor

timestamp_handling.description: messageTimestamp dari Baileys bisa berupa protobuf Long object
logic: Lalu: new Date(timestamp * 1000) untuk convert Unix timestamp ke Date
IMPORTANT: sent_at harus pakai original timestamp, BUKAN new Date() — agar urutan chat benar

considerations: History sync hanya untuk instance milik org sendiri (enforced by API key auth + org isolation)
Synced messages dianggap sama sensitif dengan real-time messages
Rate limit pada re-pair endpoint: max 1 per 10 menit per instance
Plan-based access control: Free plan TIDAK bisa sync history
Re-pair endpoint harus ada confirmation warning — this is destructive (logs out instance)

group_chat_handling.description: Edge cases untuk pesan di grup WhatsApp (remoteJid berakhir @g.us)
details: DM (direct message): remoteJid = '628xxx@s.whatsapp.net', participant = undefined
Group message: remoteJid = '120363xxx@g.us', participant = '628xxx@s.whatsapp.net' (pengirim)
Jadi chat_jid = remoteJid (always), sender_jid = participant (grup) atau remoteJid (DM)
Untuk OUTGOING di grup: fromMe=true, participant bisa undefined → sender = instance phone JID
Untuk INCOMING di grup: fromMe=false, participant = pengirim asli
is_group detection: remoteJid.endsWith('@g.us')
Saat sync contacts: grup contacts punya jid @g.us — mark is_group=true

concurrency_and_mutex.description: Handling concurrent messaging-history.set batches dan race conditions
problem: WhatsApp bisa kirim beberapa messaging-history.set batch bersamaan
Emit-level handler bisa dipanggil lagi sebelum batch sebelumnya selesai di-insert
Tanpa mutex: progress counter bisa race, status bisa overwrite, batch bisa disorder

solution.approach: Per-instance processing queue menggunakan simple async mutex
implementation: Buat Map<string, Promise<void>> syncLocks — satu lock per instanceId
Setiap batch masuk: await existing lock, then set new lock
Ini memastikan batch diproses SEQUENTIAL per instance, tapi PARALLEL antar instance
Tidak perlu library external — pure Promise chaining

retry_and_resume.description: Apa yang terjadi jika sync gagal / server restart di tengah sync

scenarios.handling: Per-batch try/catch. Failed batch di-skip, counter batch_errors++. Status jadi PARTIAL jika ada failures. Messages yang belum ter-insert akan ter-deduplicate jika user re-pair nanti.

Status akan tetap SYNCING di DB. Saat server start ulang, initializeActiveInstances() reconnect semua instance. Tapi karena session sudah exist (bukan fresh pair), WhatsApp TIDAK kirim ulang history. Status SYNCING menjadi stale. Solusi: Tambah cleanup di initializeActiveInstances() — jika status=SYNCING dan last_history_sync_at > 10 menit lalu, set status=PARTIAL.

scenarios.scenario: User mau sync ulang setelah partial/failed
scenarios.handling: User harus POST re-pair endpoint → logout → scan QR baru → full re-sync. Messages yang sudah ada akan di-skip oleh skipDuplicates (unique constraint). Hanya messages baru yang belum ter-insert akan ditambahkan.

scenarios.scenario: OOM / memory crash saat batch besar
scenarios.handling: Batch size 100 sudah sangat konservatif. Tapi jika messages BESAR (banyak media captions), bisa turunkan ke 50. Monitor memory usage via process.memoryUsage().heapUsed.

stale_sync_cleanup.logic: SELECT WHERE history_sync_status = 'SYNCING' AND updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE → UPDATE SET history_sync_status = 'PARTIAL'
stale_sync_cleanup.reason: Server restart = sync pasti sudah mati. Jangan biarkan status SYNCING stale selamanya.

message_transform_spec.description: Mapping dari Baileys WAMessage ke Prisma Message — REVISED

mapping.sender_jid: msg.key.fromMe ? instancePhoneJid : (msg.key.participant || msg.key.remoteJid)  // participant filled for GROUP chats, remoteJid for DMs
mapping.message_type: from extractMessageContent() — includes REACTION, POLL, UNKNOWN

message_type_detection.note: Reuses extractMessageContent() which handles ALL types from handleIncomingMessage:

sent_at_vs_created_at.sent_at: Original message timestamp dari WhatsApp (bisa berhari/berminggu/berbulan lalu)
sent_at_vs_created_at.created_at: Timestamp saat record di-insert ke DB (saat sync berjalan)
sent_at_vs_created_at.importance: Dashboard dan API harus pakai sent_at untuk display urutan chat, BUKAN created_at

estimated_total.schema_changes: 2 new enums + 3 new values on MessageType + 4 fields on WhatsAppInstance + 1 field on Message + 1 unique constraint + 2 fields on SubscriptionPlan + 1 new index
estimated_total.frontend_components: 1 new tab + 1 filter + 4 webhook toggles + 3 API methods + 3 hooks + 6 types

testing_strategy.description: Test plan untuk memastikan sync bekerja benar sebelum production

tests: TEXT: conversation field → return { text: 'hello', messageType: 'TEXT' }
IMAGE: imageMessage with caption → return { text: 'caption', messageType: 'IMAGE' }
Empty: no message content → return null

integration_tests.setup: Create test instance with sync_history_on_connect=true in test DB
steps: Call handleHistorySync with 5 mock messages (mix INCOMING + OUTGOING)
Assert 5 messages in DB with correct direction, source=HISTORY_SYNC
Call again with same messages → assert still 5 (skipDuplicates)
Call with 3 new + 2 existing → assert 8 total
Create instance with sync_history_on_connect=false
Call handleHistorySync with 5 messages
Assert 0 messages in DB (all skipped)
Send mock message with remoteJid='120363xxx@g.us', participant='628xxx@s.whatsapp.net'
Assert chat_jid = group JID, sender_jid = participant
Send mock outgoing group message (fromMe=true)
Assert sender_jid = instance phone JID, direction = OUTGOING
Create org with Starter plan (max_sync_messages=5000)
Insert 4999 synced messages
Call sync with 10 new messages → assert only 1 inserted (hits cap at 5000)
Or: assert all 10 rejected with quota error
1. Enable sync_history_on_connect via API or dashboard
2. Connect instance (scan QR for first time → fresh pair)
3. Watch server logs for messaging-history.set events
4. Check DB: messages should appear with source=HISTORY_SYNC
5. Check dashboard: History Sync tab shows progress/completed
6. Check messages page: synced messages visible with purple badge
7. Disconnect instance
8. Reconnect (same session, no QR) → verify NO duplicate messages inserted
1. POST /api/instances/:id/sync-history/re-pair
2. Verify instance status becomes DISCONNECTED
3. Reconnect + scan QR baru
4. Verify history sync starts (new messages appear)
5. Existing messages should be deduplicated (skipDuplicates)

test_tooling.test_db: Use separate test database or prisma mock
test_tooling.mock_data: Create WAMessage fixtures for each message type
